analysis.summary: TiDB is a distributed SQL database written in Go that provides ACID-compliant transactions across multiple nodes using a two-phase commit protocol. It separates compute from storage layers, supports both row-based (TiKV) and columnar (TiFlash) storage engines for HTAP workloads, and includes backup/restore tools (BR) and data import utilities (Lightning).
capabilities: Executes distributed SQL queries with ACID transaction guarantees using two-phase commit protocol (pkg/executor/, pkg/kv/)
Parses and optimizes SQL statements through cost-based optimizer (pkg/parser/, pkg/planner/)
Manages distributed transactions across multiple TiKV nodes (pkg/store/tikv/)
Provides backup and restore functionality for cluster data (br/pkg/backup/, br/pkg/restore/)
Imports data from various sources including CSV, SQL dumps, and Parquet files (lightning/)
Serves MySQL-compatible protocol for client connections (pkg/server/)
Manages table statistics for query optimization (pkg/statistics/)
Handles DDL operations in distributed environment (pkg/ddl/)
Provides telemetry and metrics collection (pkg/telemetry/, pkg/metrics/)
technical_stack: Apache Arrow for columnar data processing (go.mod: github.com/apache/arrow-go)
AWS SDK for cloud storage integration (go.mod: github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go)
integrations: etcd for PD cluster coordination (go.mod: go.etcd.io/etcd)

api_endpoints.path: SQL query execution via MySQL protocol on port 4000 (pkg/server/)
Lightning web UI endpoints for data import monitoring (lightning/web/)

technical_facts: Executes distributed SQL queries with ACID transaction guarantees using two-phase commit protocol (pkg/executor/, pkg/kv/)
Parses and optimizes SQL statements through cost-based optimizer (pkg/parser/, pkg/planner/)
Manages distributed transactions across multiple TiKV nodes (pkg/store/tikv/)
Provides backup and restore functionality for cluster data (br/pkg/backup/, br/pkg/restore/)
Imports data from various sources including CSV, SQL dumps, and Parquet files (lightning/)
Serves MySQL-compatible protocol for client connections (pkg/server/)
Manages table statistics for query optimization (pkg/statistics/)
Handles DDL operations in distributed environment (pkg/ddl/)
Provides telemetry and metrics collection (pkg/telemetry/, pkg/metrics/)

architecture_patterns: distributed system with separated compute and storage layers
Concurrency: goroutines with async I/O for handling concurrent connections and distributed operations (pkg/server/conn.go, pkg/store/tikv/)
deployment_options: CI/CD: GitHub Actions (implied from file structure), Jenkins (Jenkinsfile), Bazel build system (BUILD.bazel files)

functional_dna.logic_archetype_evidence: Manages distributed transactions across multiple TiKV nodes (pkg/store/tikv/) and handles DDL operations in distributed environment (pkg/ddl/) with ACID transaction guarantees using two-phase commit protocol
functional_dna.data_contract_evidence: Parses and optimizes SQL statements through cost-based optimizer (pkg/parser/, pkg/planner/) and serves MySQL-compatible protocol for client connections (pkg/server/)
functional_dna.core_algorithmic_evidence: Uses two-phase commit protocol for ACID transaction guarantees (pkg/executor/, pkg/kv/) and coordinates with etcd for metadata storage and PD cluster coordination
functional_dna.concurrency_evidence: Executes distributed SQL queries with ACID transaction guarantees using two-phase commit protocol (pkg/executor/, pkg/kv/)
functional_dna.repurposing_reasoning: High confidence due to generic distributed transaction management and SQL processing capabilities, but moderate due to tight coupling with TiKV storage layer and specific database-oriented architecture patterns

evidence_claims.evidence: Executes distributed SQL queries with ACID transaction guarantees using two-phase commit protocol (pkg/executor/, pkg/kv/)
Parses and optimizes SQL statements through cost-based optimizer (pkg/parser/, pkg/planner/)
Manages distributed transactions across multiple TiKV nodes (pkg/store/tikv/)
Provides backup and restore functionality for cluster data (br/pkg/backup/, br/pkg/restore/) and imports data from various sources including CSV, SQL dumps, and Parquet files (lightning/)
